docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT YU, MARILYN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED MAY-09-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YU, MARILYN
ORDER RE: ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(DEFENDANT)**GRANTED**
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT YU, MARILYN
REMARK: DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECD VIA MAIL & SUBMITTED
ORDER OF DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,273.38 FILED BY HARDY, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT YU, MARILYN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2022 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDARTO JUL-29-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL HARDY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARILYN YU IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. PARTIES AGREE TO A SETTLEMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,135.91. DEFENDANT PAYS PLAINTIFF THE AGREED TO AMOUNT IN OPEN COURT BY PAYPAL. CASE SETTLED. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (506)
